name: skill-optimizer
description: Agent skill eval workbench for authoring, running, and grading deterministic Docker-based skill cases.

interface.shortDescription: Author and run deterministic Docker evals for agent skills.
interface.longDescription: Use skill-optimizer to create realistic agent skill eval cases, run OpenRouter model matrices in Docker, preflight reference solutions, inspect traces, and grade deterministic local outcomes.
defaultPrompt: Use skill-optimizer to create an eval suite for this agent skill.
Use skill-optimizer to run and debug this skill eval suite.
